description_long: This is a rectangular carton of Žemaitijos Kefyras, a dairy-based beverage, with a predominantly yellow and white color scheme. The front panel features the Žemaitijos brand logo, the product name 'Kefyras', and an illustration of cows grazing in a field, suggesting a natural, farm-fresh product. The side panels display detailed product information, including nutritional facts, a barcode, and additional branding elements. The top of the carton is folded into a pointed spout, typical of drink cartons, and is sealed without a visible screw cap or pull tab. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with a thin plastic lining inside to contain the liquid. The overall design is clean and informative, with both text and imagery emphasizing traditional dairy production.
description: A yellow and white rectangular carton of Žemaitijos Kefyras with cow illustrations and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Žemaitijos brand, 'Kefyras' label, and cow illustration.
description_view_1: Side view with product description, a cartoon cow, and additional branding details.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, highlighting the main branding and illustration.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel, barcode, and product details.
